votes.rationale: WS-B deliverable complete: agent-demand-matrix.schema.yaml v0.1 committed with NH-suffix convention corrected (council=nh_root, governance=.1-.4, execution=.10-.14), scope_actions field added, governance_resident_only flag defined, and staffing_tier_rules documented.

NH convention defect identified and corrected against baseline config/agency.yaml. Council correctly set to nh_root with no suffix. OffBook.ai produces 9 agents with correct IDs under the corrected convention.
Demand matrix is internally consistent. OffBook.ai example validates the schema. Staffing tier rules are unambiguous.
